name: Mondel Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. Beat the eggs, vanilla extract, lemon juice, and oil into the well.
4. Divide the dough into three equal portions.
5. Roll one portion at a time into a rectangle about 12 inches long.
6. Sprinkle the rolled dough with cinnamon, sugar, nuts, raisins, and chocolate chips (if using).
7. Fold the edges of the dough toward the center to enclose the filling.
8. Place the filled rolls on greased cookie sheets.
9. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C), or until golden brown.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
11. Using a sharp knife, cut the cooled rolls diagonally into 1-inch wide strips to create individual cookies.
12. Return the cookie pieces to the oven for an additional 5 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
